About Me

Who I Am

I'm G. Vijayanand, a passionate Full Stack Developer and Electronics enthusiast, currently interning at EvolveX. I specialize in building end-to-end web applications that solve real-world problems â€” combining clean, intuitive user interfaces with scalable and efficient backend systems.

Alongside software development, I have a strong interest in VLSI and core electronics, exploring how hardware and intelligent systems come together to power modern technology. This dual focus allows me to think beyond code and approach problems with a deeper engineering perspective.

During my internship, I developed Jule AI â€” an intelligent legal assistant platform designed to help lawyers streamline workflows using the power of artificial intelligence, improving efficiency and decision-making.

I'm constantly exploring new technologies across AI/ML, system design, and electronics, pushing my limits, and turning ideas into functional, impactful, and beautifully crafted products.

HackForge 2025

Where I built Jule AI under pressure and won recognition.

âš¡ HackForge
ðŸ† Participant

Jule AI â€” Legal Intelligence Platform

At HackForge, I built Jule AI â€” an AI-powered legal assistant designed to transform how lawyers work. The platform leverages large language models to help legal professionals draft documents instantly, research case law, summarize lengthy contracts, and automate repetitive legal workflows.

The goal was simple: make legal work faster, smarter, and more accessible. Lawyers spend hours on documentation and research â€” Jule AI cuts that down dramatically, letting them focus on what matters most: their clients.
